seoTitle: Betley vs Beverford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Betley and Beverford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Betley and Beverford.
heading: Betley vs Beverford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Betley, Victoria and Beverford, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Betley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Beverford (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Betley or Beverford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Betley has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Beverford scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Betley scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Beverford scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Betley or Beverford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Betley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
